zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前BNB/USD处于高位回落后的窄幅震荡结构，价格围绕602美元附近运行，整体动能偏弱，多空博弈加剧，短线缺乏明确方向，呈现横盘整理格局。

均线方面价格跌破SMA20约604.5，短期均线压制明显；MACD仍为正值但动能柱趋缓，显示上涨动能衰减，市场进入修正阶段，缺乏趋势延续性。

下方支撑集中在602.3与602.0整数关口，若跌破或下探600区域；上方阻力在604.5及605一线，需放量突破才能打开进一步上行空间。

操作上建议短线高抛低吸为主，靠近602支撑可轻仓试多，反弹至604-605区域逐步止盈；若跌破602应及时止损观望，等待方向确认。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is currently moving within a very tight consolidation band around 602, reflecting reduced volatility and indecision in short-term direction. Price action is slightly biased to the downside as it trades just below the 20-period SMA near 604.48. The narrow 24-hour range between 602.38 and 604.08 suggests equilibrium between buyers and sellers, with momentum lacking conviction for a sustained breakout in either direction.

Indicators show a mixed picture, with the price positioned below the SMA(20), which now acts as dynamic resistance. Although MACD is positive at 0.796, the absence of a signal line reading limits confirmation of bullish crossover strength. Overall momentum appears neutral to mildly bullish but is losing traction, indicating that upside attempts may struggle unless volume increases and price reclaims the 604 zone convincingly.

Key support is forming at 602.38, aligned with the recent 24-hour low, and a break below this level could expose the psychological 600 mark as the next downside area. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 604.08 and the SMA(20) near 604.48, with a further barrier around 610 if bullish momentum returns. The structure suggests a compressed range awaiting directional expansion.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies until a decisive breakout occurs. Long positions may be considered near support around 602 or on dips toward 600 with tight risk controls, while short setups become more attractive if price rejects the 604–604.5 resistance zone. A confirmed breakout above SMA(20) would signal renewed bullish continuation, whereas a breakdown below 602 would shift bias toward deeper corrective pressure.
